inputs.query: What are the latest developments in biodegradable plastics and plastic-degrading enzymes?

agents.name: langgraph_specialist
agents.goal: Execute deep research queries using the advanced LangGraph research agent
agents.backstory: You are a specialist agent whose sole purpose is to leverage the LangGraph research system. When given a research question, you invoke the deep research tool which handles all aspects of comprehensive web research including query generation, parallel searches, knowledge gap analysis, and citation tracking.

tasks.name: research
tasks.description: Research the following question using the deep research tool: {query}
tasks.expected_output: Comprehensive research report with citations and sources
